compiled_state.title: RED: Tests for archive eligibility traversal
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create tests for the transitive dependency traversal algorithm that determines archive eligibility.

## File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh`
- Modify: `.test-index` (add mapping with RED marker)

## TDD Requirement (RED)
- `test_unreachable_closed_ticket_is_eligible`: Create 3 tickets: A (open), B (closed, depends on A), C (closed, no deps). C is eligible for archival. RED because compute_archive_eligible() doesn't exist.
- `test_reachable_closed_ticket_is_ineligible`: A (open) depends_on B (closed). B is reachable from A via depends_on → ineligible.
- `test_transitive_reachability`: A (open) → B (closed) → C (closed). Both B and C ineligible (transitive chain).
- `test_relates_to_edges_ignored`: A (open) relates_to B (closed). B IS eligible (relates_to edges ignored).

Test approach: Create ticket fixtures with dependency edges, call the eligibility function, assert on the returned set.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists with 4+ test functions
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh && grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests fail RED
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'test-ticket-archive-eligibility' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment — Edge Direction Tests

Add explicit edge-direction test cases:
- test_depends_on_makes_ineligible: open A depends_on closed B → B is NOT eligible
- test_blocks_makes_ineligible: closed C blocks open D → C is NOT eligible
- Ensure transitive chains follow both depends_on AND blocks edges from open tickets
- relates_to edges explicitly ignored (already planned)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: 6 RED tests for archive eligibility traversal.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
